Package org.rodinp.internal.core

Class ClearElementsOperation

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.RodinDBOperation
org.rodinp.internal.core.MultiOperation
org.rodinp.internal.core.ClearElementsOperation
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.resources.IWorkspaceRunnable, org.eclipse.core.runtime.ICoreRunnable, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor
public class ClearElementsOperation extends MultiOperation
This operation clears a collection of elements. If an element does not exist, it is ignored.

NOTE: This operation only clears elements that are Rodin files or internal.

  • Field Details

    • childrenToClear

      protected Map<RodinFile,IRegion> childrenToClear
      The elements this operation processes grouped by Rodin file
      See Also:
      • Keys are Rodin files, values are IRegions of elements to be processed in each compilation unit.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClearElementsOperation

      protected ClearElementsOperation(IRodinElement[] elementsToClear, boolean force)
      When executed, this operation will clear the given elements. The elements to clear cannot be null or empty, and must be contained within a Rodin file.

    • ClearElementsOperation

      public ClearElementsOperation(IRodinElement elementToClear, boolean force)
      When executed, this operation will clear the given element. The element to clear cannot be null or empty, and must be contained within a Rodin file.

  • Method Details

    • getMainTaskName

      protected String getMainTaskName()
      Description copied from class: MultiOperation
      Returns the name to be used by the progress monitor.

    • getSchedulingRule

      protected org.eclipse.core.runtime.jobs.ISchedulingRule getSchedulingRule()
      Description copied from class: RodinDBOperation
      Returns the scheduling rule for this operation (i.e. the resource that needs to be locked while this operation is running). Subclasses can override.
      Overrides:
      getSchedulingRule in class RodinDBOperation

    • groupElements

      protected void groupElements() throws RodinDBException
      Groups the elements to be processed by their Rodin file. If parent/child combinations are present, children are discarded (only the parents are processed). Removes any duplicates specified in elements to be processed.
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

      protected void processElement(IRodinElement element) throws RodinDBException
      Clears all requested elements from the given Rodin file

    • processElements

      protected void processElements() throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from class: MultiOperation
      Processes all the IRodinElements in turn, collecting errors and updating the progress monitor.
      Overrides:
      processElements in class MultiOperation
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if one or several operation(s) was unable to be completed.
      See Also:
      • This method first groups the elements by RodinFile, and then processes the RodinFiles.

    • verify

      protected void verify(IRodinElement element) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from class: MultiOperation
      This method is called for each IRodinElement before processElement. It should check that this element can be processed.
      Specified by:
      verify in class MultiOperation
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
      See Also:
      • MultiOperation
